name: czech-b1-flashcards
description: Czech A2/B1 flashcards with shared React Native mobile and web UI, plus shared study logic.

scripts.start: npm run build:web && python3 -m http.server 5173 -d apps/mobile/dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.check: node --check legacy-web/app.js && node scripts/check-legacy-reference.mjs && node scripts/check-readme-architecture.mjs && node --check data/vocabulary.js && node --check data/extended-lemmas.js && node --check data/focus-decks.js && node --check data/b1-verb-pack.js && node --check data/verb-forms.js && node scripts/validate-data.js && node scripts/export-shared-seed.js --check && node --test packages/shared/test/*.test.mjs && node scripts/check-scripts-architecture.mjs && node scripts/check-shared-architecture.mjs && node scripts/check-mobile-architecture.mjs && npm --prefix apps/mobile run check:theme
